issues.description: Missing condition for optional cost. Card text states 'You may place 2 cards with a type including "CP" from your trash at the bottom of your deck in any order' as a requirement before the KO effect can trigger. This requires a Condition checking TrashCount and a cost action (likely SearchDeck or similar to return cards from trash to deck bottom).
Missing maxTargets constraint. Card text specifies 'up to 1' opponent Character, but DSL lacks maxTargets field limiting selections to 1.
